name: TRELLIS.2
description: TRELLIS extension for Modly with production-safe TRELLIS.2 image/texturing nodes plus native official TRELLIS text-to-mesh.
author: Lightning Pixel

nodes.name: Image to Mesh
nodes.description: Generate a textured GLB mesh from one input image using the official TRELLIS.2 image pipeline.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Voxel resolution. Higher = more geometry detail but much slower and more VRAM.

params_schema.label: Sparse Structure Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the sparse structure stage. More steps = better structure.

params_schema.label: Shape SLAT Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the shape latent stage. More steps = finer geometry.

params_schema.label: Texture SLAT Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the texture latent stage. More steps = sharper textures.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target polygon count after simplification. -1 uses 1,000,000.

params_schema.label: Texture Size
params_schema.tooltip: Resolution of the baked PBR texture atlas (base color, roughness, metallic).

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Click shuffle for a random seed.

nodes.name: Texture Mesh
nodes.description: Texture an existing mesh from one reference image using the official TRELLIS.2 texturing pipeline.

params_schema.label: Texture Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Internal voxel/texturing resolution used by the TRELLIS.2 texturing pipeline. 1024 gives better fidelity but costs more VRAM and time.

params_schema.label: Texture SLAT Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the texture latent stage. More steps = sharper textures.

params_schema.label: Texture Size
params_schema.tooltip: Resolution of the exported texture atlas. Higher values improve detail but increase memory and export time.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Click shuffle for a random seed.

nodes.name: Text to Mesh
nodes.description: Generate a textured GLB mesh from a text prompt using the official native TRELLIS text pipeline.

params_schema.label: Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt used by the native TRELLIS text-to-mesh pipeline.

params_schema.label: Sparse Structure Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the sparse structure stage.

params_schema.label: Structured Latent Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the structured latent stage.

params_schema.label: Sparse CFG
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength for sparse structure generation.

params_schema.label: Structured Latent CFG
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength for structured latent generation.

params_schema.label: Texture Size
params_schema.tooltip: Resolution of the baked texture atlas used by official TRELLIS postprocessing.

params_schema.label: Simplify Ratio
params_schema.tooltip: Triangle simplification ratio used during GLB postprocessing.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Click shuffle for a random seed.

models.name: TRELLIS.2-4B
models.description: 4B-parameter O-Voxel diffusion model for high-fidelity image-to-3D with PBR textures (~24GB VRAM)

models.name: TRELLIS Text XL
models.description: Official native TRELLIS text-to-mesh model weights.
